## Checklist

- [ ] I changed `data/selected_papers.json` when catalog data changed.
- [ ] Every source has provenance fields and an appropriate `claim_scope`.
- [ ] I ran `make generate` after catalog changes.
- [ ] I ran `make check`.
- [ ] Schema/playbook changes either update SQL DDL or document a future-only object.
- [ ] No paper PDFs or copied paper text were added.

## Validation

make check
